pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the Dubai bank codes site and linking to all key tools, with shortcuts into search, locator, fee comparison, IBAN tools, and guides plus summaries of recent and saved items.
primary_functions: Provide quick entry points to bank search, branch locator, fee comparison, IBAN tools, and guides
Surface popular tasks such as finding SWIFT codes, locating branches, and validating IBANs
Give access to recently viewed and saved branches or bookmarked guides

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a quick task such as 'Find a SWIFT code' or use header link 'Bank & Branch Search'
Click a quick task such as 'Locate a branch' or use header link 'Branch Locator'
Click quick task card 'Compare branch fees'
Click quick task card 'IBAN tools & validator'
Click quick task card 'Guides & FAQs'
Click 'View all saved items' from the saved summary widget
Click a guide title in 'Recently viewed guides'
Click a branch name in 'Recently viewed branches'

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Home'
Users can land directly on index.html via URL or bookmark

pages.name: Bank & Branch Search / Branch Locator
pages.description: Unified interface for searching and locating Dubai bank branches by name, filters, and map/area, supporting both name-based search and locator-style discovery.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for branches by bank or branch name using the 'Bank & Branch Search' mode
Allow users to locate branches via area-based filters using the 'Branch Locator' mode
Filter branches by city, area, services, currencies, and opening or closing times
Display branch search results with options to view branch details, add branches to a comparison list, or select branches for direct comparison

incoming_params.description: Determines which UI mode to load: 'bank_search' for name-based search or 'branch_locator' for area-based locator.
Optional free-text search query to pre-populate the 'Search by bank or branch' field.
Optional bank identifier used to pre-filter results to a specific bank.
Optional city filter to apply on initial load, e.g. 'Dubai'.
Optional area filter to apply on initial load, e.g. 'Deira' or 'Dubai Marina'.
Comma-separated list of service type identifiers (e.g. 'retail_banking,corporate_banking') to pre-filter results.
Comma-separated list of currency codes (e.g. 'USD,EUR') used to pre-filter branches by supported currencies.
Optional closing time filter value such as 'after_8_pm' to pre-filter late-opening branches.
Optional sort key for initial results ordering (e.g. 'name', 'weekday_close_time', 'usd_transfer_cutoff_time').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a branch name row in the search or locator results table/list.
Click the 'Compare selected (n)' button after ticking result checkboxes.
Click a floating 'View comparison (n)' control that appears once branches are added to comparison.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Bank & Branch Search' (mode=bank_search) and 'Branch Locator' (mode=branch_locator) links in the main navigation.
Other pages can deep-link with filters and mode using query parameters.
Users can navigate directly to branches.html with or without query parameters.

pages.name: Branch Details
pages.description: Detailed view of a single branch, including codes, hours, fees, services, and actions like copying codes, saving the branch, comparing, or reporting an issue.
primary_functions: Display full details of a specific branch including bank name, address, area, contact details, services, and opening hours
Show SWIFT/BIC codes and routing/local branch codes with clear labeling
Provide one-click copy actions for SWIFT/BIC codes and routing/local branch codes
Allow users to save or favorite the branch for later reference
Provide a link to report issues or corrections for the branch information

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the branch whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Report an issue with these details' link or button.
Click a 'View comparison (n)' control after adding this branch to comparison.

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to branch_detail.html with a branchId query parameter from search, comparison, bank overview, or saved items.
Branch detail URLs can be bookmarked or shared directly.

pages.name: Fee Comparison
pages.description: Tool to compare branch-level fees, especially for international transfers, allowing filtering by bank and fee type and surfacing the cheapest matching branches.
primary_functions: Filter branches by bank name, fee type (e.g., outgoing international transfer), and maximum fee amount
Sort matching branches by transfer fee and other fee-related metrics
Display fee comparison results with clear indication of the cheapest branches meeting the criteria
Link directly from fee results to branch detail pages to allow saving branches or copying their codes

incoming_params.description: Optional bank identifier used to pre-select a bank for fee comparison.
Optional fee type key such as 'outgoing_international_transfer' to pre-select the type of fee to compare.
Optional numeric maximum fee (e.g. 20) to pre-populate the 'Max fee (AED)' field.
Optional currency code (e.g. 'AED') used for initial fee comparisons.
Optional sort key for results (e.g. 'fee_amount_asc').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a branch row or 'View details' link in the fee comparison results.
Click 'Compare selected (n)' after ticking multiple result rows.
Click a 'View comparison (n)' control that appears once branches are added to comparison.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Compare fees'.
Deep-linked from other pages with pre-selected bank or fee filters.
Users can open compare_fees.html directly or via bookmark.

pages.name: IBAN Tools
pages.description: Landing page for IBAN-related tools and educational resources, highlighting the IBAN validator and relevant learning guides.
primary_functions: List available IBAN tools such as the IBAN Validator with brief descriptions
Provide a clear link to open the IBAN Validator tool
Highlight recommended IBAN-related guides, including IBAN basics and Dubai IBAN structure explanations

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'IBAN Validator' tool card or button.
Click a tag or CTA like 'Learn IBAN basics'.
Click on a recommended IBAN-related guide title.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'IBAN Tools'.
Users can open iban_tools.html directly.

pages.name: IBAN Validator
pages.description: Interactive tool to validate IBANs and identify the associated bank and branch area, with links into bank-level details.
primary_functions: Allow users to input an IBAN and trigger validation of its structure and checksum
Display validation results including validity status, bank name, and any available branch or area information
Provide a direct link from the validation results to the associated bank overview page

incoming_params.description: Optional IBAN string to pre-populate the input field when opening the validator.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the linked bank name in the validation result panel.
Click breadcrumb or 'Back to IBAN tools' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed from IBAN Tools 'IBAN Validator' link or directly via URL, optionally with an iban query parameter.

pages.name: Bank Overview
pages.description: Overview page for a specific bank, summarizing its presence and branches in Dubai, with tools to dive into branch-level details.
primary_functions: Present high-level information about a specific bank such as description, contact channels, and general codes
List the bank's Dubai branches with filters for area (e.g., Deira) and possibly services or currencies
Enable navigation from the bank-level overview to individual branch detail pages

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the bank whose overview should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a branch in the bank's branch list.
Click a control like 'View these branches in Branch Locator'.
Click a CTA like 'Compare transfer fees for this bank'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via bank_overview.html with a bankId parameter from the IBAN Validator or other pages.
Bank overview URLs can be bookmarked or shared.

pages.name: Branch Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of selected branches to aid in choosing the best option based on currencies, cut-off times, and fees.
primary_functions: Display two or more selected branches side-by-side with key attributes such as fees, supported currencies, and cut-off times
Highlight specific comparison rows such as 'USD transfer cut-off time' and 'International transfer currencies'
Allow users to save or mark a preferred branch directly from the comparison view
Optionally remove branches from the comparison list or return to the branch locator

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the comparison set to display; if omitted, the active comparison set from local state may be used.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View saved items' link after saving a preferred branch.
Click a branch name in the comparison table header.

access_methods.description: Accessed when the user clicks 'Compare selected (n)' or 'View comparison (n)', passing a comparisonSetId.
An existing comparisonSetId URL can be bookmarked or re-opened.

pages.name: Guides & FAQs
pages.description: Library of guides and frequently asked questions about Dubai bank codes and related topics, with filters and search to find relevant articles.
primary_functions: List all guides and FAQs with titles, short descriptions, and estimated reading times
Filter guides by topic tags such as 'IBAN basics' or other relevant categories
Provide search or browsing controls to quickly find guides about IBAN structure, SWIFT codes, and transfers
Link to individual guide detail pages for full content

incoming_params.description: Optional topic tag (e.g. 'IBAN basics') used to pre-filter guides.
Optional free-text search string to filter guides by title or content.
Optional maximum reading time filter (e.g. 10) to show only shorter guides.
Optional sort key, such as 'recent' or 'reading_time_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a guide title in the listing.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Guides & FAQs'.
Search, tag, and reading time filters can be applied via query parameters.
Users can open the guides listing directly.

pages.name: Guide Detail
pages.description: Article page showing the full content of a specific guide or FAQ, with TOC navigation and bookmarking/reading list actions.
primary_functions: Display the full content of a selected guide, including headings, examples, and diagrams where relevant
Provide an in-page table of contents with jump links to sections such as 'Example: Dubai account format'
Support smooth scrolling so users can position subsections like 'Sample IBAN breakdown' near the top of the content area
Allow users to bookmark the guide and save it to a personal reading list via a 'Bookmark this guide' and 'Save to reading list' action

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the guide to display.
SEO/article slug, such as 'dubai_iban_structure', which is mapped internally to a guideId.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View reading list' after bookmarking or saving the guide.
Click 'Back to Guides & FAQs'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via guideId or articleId query parameters from the guides listing, footer link, or other pages.
Guide URLs can be bookmarked or shared.

pages.name: Branch Issue Report
pages.description: Form page for reporting inaccuracies or issues in a branch's details, pre-populated with the current stored data for that branch.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the branch for which an issue is being reported
Collect user information such as name and email address
Allow users to select an issue type (e.g., incorrect branch code) and urgency level
Provide a description text area for users to explain the correction or issue in detail
Offer an option for users to request a copy of their report via email
Submit the issue report and show a confirmation message

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the branch for which an issue is being reported.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to branch details' link after submitting or cancelling the issue report.

access_methods.description: Accessed from a branch detail page via branch_issue.html?branchId=...

pages.name: Saved Items
pages.description: Single-user list of saved branches and bookmarked guides, acting as a personal shortlist and reading list.
primary_functions: List all branches the user has saved or favorited, including those chosen from comparisons or fee searches
List all guides and articles the user has bookmarked or saved to a reading list
Provide quick navigation back to branch detail pages, comparison views, or guide detail pages from saved items
Allow users to remove branches or guides from their saved lists

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved branch name.
Click a saved guide title.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry 'Saved'.
Users can directly open their saved items page.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the Dubai bank codes website, its scope, and how information is maintained.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose and scope of the website, focusing on Dubai bank codes and branch information
Describe data sources, update practices, and any limitations or disclaimers about accuracy

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link like 'Contact us' for further questions.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'About'.
About page can be opened directly.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and general enquiry form for the website, allowing feedback and support requests.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as email address or contact form for general questions and feedback
Allow users to send non-branch-specific enquiries or suggestions to the site maintainers

incoming_params.description: Optional topic key used to pre-select a subject in the contact form.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Contact'.
Contact page can be opened directly.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Details on how user data and site analytics are handled, including cookies, saved preferences, and third-party services.
primary_functions: Explain what personal or usage data may be collected when users interact with the site
Describe how cookies, analytics, and stored preferences (such as saved items) are used and managed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link referencing the Terms of Use from the privacy content.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Privacy policy'.
Users can open the privacy policy directly.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms and conditions governing use of the website, disclaiming liability for financial decisions.
primary_functions: Set out the terms and conditions under which the website may be used
Clarify disclaimers regarding the accuracy and completeness of bank codes, fees, and other financial information

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link referencing the Privacy Policy from the terms content.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'Terms of use'.
Users can open the terms page directly.

pages.name: Help / How It Works
pages.description: Guided help for completing core tasks on the site, including SWIFT lookup, branch location, fee comparison, IBAN validation, and reporting issues.
primary_functions: Provide step-by-step instructions for key tasks like finding SWIFT codes, locating branches, comparing fees, and validating IBANs
Offer troubleshooting tips for situations such as not finding a specific branch or code
Link to relevant tools, the branch locator, and specific guides for deeper assistance

incoming_params.description: Optional section key (e.g. 'find_swift_code', 'compare_fees') to deep-link to a specific help section.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a CTA within the 'find_swift_code' help section to open the Bank & Branch Search.
Click a CTA within the branch locator help section.
Click a CTA within the 'compare_fees' help section.
Click a CTA within the 'validate_iban' help section.
Click a CTA recommending further reading in Guides & FAQs.

access_methods.description: Footer link 'How it works'.
Help page can be opened directly with or without a specific section key.

header_links.description: Search Dubai banks and branches by name
Locate branches by area, services, and hours
Compare branch fees for transfers and other services
Access IBAN validation and related tools
Read guides and FAQs about Dubai bank codes and IBANs
View your saved branches and bookmarked guides

footer_links.description: About the Dubai bank codes website
Instructions for using the site and its tools
Information on privacy and data handling
Guide explaining Dubai IBAN structure and examples
